title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 14 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 14/09/2021
Image reference: 2021-09-14_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-14-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. Aframax Sunny Atlantica (114,900 DWT, Nov 2006, Samsung) sold to Turkish buyers for USD 15.50 mil, VV value USD 16.09 mil - SS Due. MR2 Hellas Explorer (51,300 DWT, Jan 2008, STX Offshore) sold to Astra Shipmanagement for USD 12.80 mil, VV value USD 12.64 mil.
